headline: Realty Income's Data Center Bet Could Turbocharge Dividend Growth Over the Next Decade
summary: The real estate investment trust best known for specializing in brick-and-mortar retailing is getting into an unlikely -- but brilliant -- business.

headline: The Set It and Forget It Monthly Dividend Stocks Retirees Wish They’d Bought 20 Years Ago
summary: Five stocks have quietly mailed income checks every single month for years, but their dividend safety, growth potential, and hidden risks vary far more than their yields suggest.
